---
name: Enhancement suggestion
about: Suggest new data, a new table, or another improvement
title: "[ENHANCEMENT] short description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: sadanandv
---

<!--
Thanks for suggesting an improvement to fifa-worldcup-data.

Scope note: this is the R package, which is permanently frozen at its 29-table core
(the 27 original Fjelstul datasets plus var_interventions and in_match_penalties).
Ratings, weather, features, forecasts, and any modeling content do NOT belong in the
R package — those live exclusively in the companion Python package
(fifa-worldcup-data on PyPI). If your idea is analytical or predictive, please file it
against the Python repository instead.

Original database © 2023 Joshua C. Fjelstul, Ph.D. | https://github.com/jfjelstul/worldcup
-->

### Description of the enhancement
<!-- What are you proposing? Be specific about the outcome. -->


### Datasets affected or created
<!-- Which existing tables change, or what new table is proposed?
     Remember: R stays within its 29-table core. -->


### Proposed data source
<!-- URL or citation for the source data. Note its license — anything redistributed
     here must be compatible with CC-BY-SA 4.0. -->


### Does this require a schema change?
<!-- New columns on an existing table? A new table? Or no schema change?
     If yes, describe the proposed columns/types. -->


### Priority justification
<!-- Why does this matter? This project serves five audiences — note which ones
     this helps and how:
       - personal portfolio
       - academic research
       - commercial API consumers
       - data science education
       - the open-source community -->
